title: Medieval Horizons
description: A realistic medieval survival mod with Distant Horizons and Epic Terrain world generation.
body:
![Medieval Horizons Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd23d6fb8dc1bab6fbce1204b21026a898445024.png)A realistic medieval survival with Distant Horizons and Epic Terrain world generation.
171 Mods, 14 resources packs and 1 shader.
It is focused on the visual and ambient sounds, although it has a large number of mods in which to advance, the visuals and sounds stands out. 
It has several mods for cooking, dungeons and structures, as well as fighting mods.
